title: Bolsius - 18 Scented Tealights - Sugar and Spice - Burn time of 3.5 Hours - Diameter 38 mm – Natural Extracts – Contains Vegan Wax – Palm Oil-Free
features: Bolsius's Sugar and Spice Tea lights burn for up to 3.5 hours and gradually spread their fragrance through the room, enjoy the spicy aroma of cinnamon: a real feel-good fragrance, with natural extracts and in three colour tones: yellow, orange and brown, combine the best quality with an irresistible fragrance experience - all within the comfort of your own home
The recognisable, rich and pungent feel-good fragrance of spicy cinnamon immediately gives you a warm welcome when entering your home

The mark of a quality candle is its long burning time and its use of the best raw materials, bolsius's scented tea lights don't smoke or drip, with the cotton wick of the tea lights being braided, the flame remains stable and no soot deposits or smoke arises whilst burning, bolsius's scented candles have been developed using natural extracts and spread their fragrance over a long time

Bolsius's tricolour collection combines scented tea lights in three different, natural colour tones with recognisable, familiar fragrances, you'll be enjoying reliable quality, a long burning time and a pleasant fragrance experience within the comfort of your own home

Since 1870, bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home, we do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet, bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses, it's how you can make every moment a special one, for yourself and for everyone around you
description: Product Description Bolsius's Sugar & Spice tea lights burn for up to 3.5 hours and gradually spread their fragrance through the room. Enjoy the spicy aroma of cinnamon: a real feel-good fragrance. With natural extracts and in three colour tones: yellow, orange and brown. Combine the best quality with an irresistible fragrance experience - all within the comfort of your own home! Safety Warning Do not leave the candle burning unattended. Keep it away from flammable materials. Monitor the burning time.
